name: Lack of Features
summary: Discovered theme focused on Lack of Features
representative_quotes: Re-Review after 02/05/2024 I am doing this review after 02/05/2026. Groww has still not added a live profit loss feature on F&O trades on the live charts.
Its very difficult to toggle between screens when I trade in F&O Nifty Sensex etc, and that makes me lose points and money respectively.
can't find 4hr chart data waste of time and energy

name: User Experience Issues
summary: Discovered theme focused on User Experience Issues
representative_quotes: bhai yah app bahut hi faltu hai. auto withdrawal mein aapka Paisa Jo group mein rahega vah dikhaega kya aapke account mein Chala Gaya lekin aapke account mein nahin jaega aur vah Paisa aapko milega bhi nahin aur agar milega to uske liye bahut hi aapko jyada matlab dimag kharab ho jaega itna kam karna padega support ko jo aata hai na helpline number usmein call kar karke aap thak jaaoge isliye is faltu app Ko download mat kijiye Mera Rai hai.

name: Appreciation for User Interface and Transparency
summary: Discovered theme focused on Appreciation for User Interface and Transparency
representative_quotes: Investing Made Effortless Groww has completely transformed the way I manage my investments. The user interface is incredibly clean, intuitive, and clutter-free, making it perfect for both beginners and seasoned investors. Setting up an account takes just a few minutes with their seamless paperless onboarding. What I love most is the absolute transparency—there are zero hidden charges, and investing in direct mutual funds is completely free.
